name: Nam Phrik Kaeng Khiao Wan (Green Curry Paste)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a wok over low heat, put the coriander seeds and cumin seeds and dry fry for about 5 minutes.
2. Grind into a powder.
3. Into a blender, put the rest of the ingredients except the shrimp paste.
4. Blend to mix well.
5. Add the coriander-cumin seed mixture and the shrimp paste.
6. Blend to obtain half a cup of a fine-textured paste.
7. This can be stored in a glass jar in the refrigerator for about 3-4 months.
